text:
### Application of provisions in this Part E+W


3A.2. — (1) Rule 3A.4 does not apply to a party who is a child.


(2) Rules 3A.3 to 3A.5 do not apply to a party who is a protected party.


[ F6 (3) Rules 3A.3 to 3A.5 do not apply to a party or witness who—


Textual Amendments


F6 Rule 3A.2(3) inserted (1.10.2021) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2021 (S.I. 2021/875) , rules 1 , 4 ; S.I. 2021/1038 , reg. 2(d)


### [ F7 Court’s duty to consider making participation directions: victims of domestic abuse E+W


3A.2A. — (1) Subject to paragraph (2), where it is stated that a party or witness is, or is at risk of being, a victim of domestic abuse carried out by a party, a relative of another party, or a witness in the proceedings, the court must assume that the following matters are diminished—


(2) The party or witness concerned can request that the assumption set out in paragraph (1) does not apply to them if they do not wish it to.


(3) Where the assumption set out in paragraph (1) applies, the court must consider whether it is necessary to make one or more participation directions.


[ F8 (Attention is drawn to Practice Direction 27C, which makes provision for the attendance at hearings, without the need for an order of the court, of Independent Domestic Violence Advisers and Independent Sexual Violence Advisers.) ] ]


Textual Amendments


F7 Rule 3A.2A inserted (1.10.2021) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2021 (S.I. 2021/875) , rules 1 , 5 ; S.I. 2021/1038 , reg. 2(d)


F8 Words in rule 3A.2A inserted (6.4.2023) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2023 (S.I. 2023/61) , rules 1(3) , 4
